programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Graham and Stephanie are looking for their first jet for personal and business use; Dave and Angela look to Tim Pollard at Pollard Aircraft Sales to help them with their first jet purchase.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Goa's beach front resorts; Singapore's luxury shopping and the New Majestic Hotel.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan hangs out with a group of fishermen that utilize ancient Chinese fishing nets designed in the time of Kublai Khan.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: New Orleans newlyweds Jerry and Bobby seek to upgrade their current accommodations to a spacious home; they turn to real estate agent Courtney Shulingkamp with Dorian Bennett's Sotheby's International Real Estate to help them achieve their dream.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: A look at the 200 yachts gathered in the harbor of Las Palmas in Gran Canaria to participate in a rally across the Atlantic Ocean, nearly 3000 miles to the Caribbean.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: A fully custom Mercedes Benz Sprinter that caters to those seeking an exclusive night out and celebrities looking for a fancy green room; a ride on route to one of the original cigar companies on the West Coast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: The waters of Manuk, a tiny volcanic island in Indonesia, brims with thousands of venomous sea snakes; manta rays gather for just a few weeks each year at a remote atoll in the Maldives.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: This country combines both adventure and luxury into one island experience; mysterious jungles and the Caribbean Sea.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: The most elite seaside estates and oceanfront properties in the world.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Exploring the region of western Europe that includes the Netherlands and Belgium during Tulip Time.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: New Orleans newlyweds Jerry and Bobby seek to upgrade their current accommodations to a spacious home; they turn to real estate agent Courtney Shulingkamp with Dorian Bennett's Sotheby's International Real Estate to help them achieve their dream.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: A selection of super-rich house hunters go in search of the perfect luxury home; they are willing to invest millions into high-end real estate.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The three-deck ship with a large dining room, bar, dance floor and 71 double staterooms with panoramic windows travels Spain and Portugal; ports of call include Porto, Vila Nova de Gaia, Peso Da Regua, Lamego, Vila Real, Guimaraes and Braga.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Goa's beach front resorts; Singapore's luxury shopping and the New Majestic Hotel.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: This country combines both adventure and luxury into one island experience; mysterious jungles and the Caribbean Sea.

programme.desc: The most elite seaside estates and oceanfront properties in the world.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: Visiting the Samana Peninsula, in the paradise of the Dominican Republic; discovering luxurious, welcoming and comfortable hotels as well as magnificent and relaxing beaches.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.sub-title: Outriggers and SUPs in Tahiti's Surf
programme.desc: Paddle an outrigger around the islands of Moorea and then challenge the countries surf breaks on SUPs.

programme.desc: Hosts Jeannie and Janez travel from Cape Town to Vancouver, where they set out to bike and boat their way around this British Columbia escape.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Taking a cable car to the top of Sugarloaf Mountain in Rio, Brazil and staying at the luxury Copacabana Palace hotel; in Sweden, heading to Kiruna and cooling down at the Ice hotel; staying in an igloo on the ski trails in Switzerland.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Bull sharks in Mexico; astronauts train for space walking in a giant pool at NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston.

programme.desc: Located off the coast of Granada in the Caribbean.

programme.desc: Visit the utopian Mecca.

programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Enjoying fine food and wine and view stunning architecture, medieval castles and history-rich landscapes while sailing through three countries of Central Europe on the Danube.

programme.desc: Las Vegas couple Jonathan and Angela hunt for a home; Jonathan would prefer something cozy, but Angela prefers a large estate where her family can visit.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan reveals an exclusive insight into the inner workings of the show, behind the scenes clips, along with never before seen footage and segments.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Sailing the Caribbean aboard the MSC Armonia, from Havana south to the waters and mysterious forests of Belize.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Sights, sounds and snow in Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Award winning Maroma Beach in Riviera Maya, Mexico; this unique beach offers luxury accommodations and powdered sands that never get hot; Bangkok and a ride on the Orient Express.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Marine naturalist and underwater filmmaker Jonathan Bird discusses animal themes, marine research, underwater exploration and recent discoveries.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: An island where the finest luxuries co-exist in absolute harmony with nature.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Custom spaces created for some of the most lavish and distinctive homes; from a teach savvy Nantucket beach house to a $35 million mega-mansion.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Lynton explores the coral coast of Fiji; Carolyne visits the wonders of Florence, Italy; Scotty continues his journey through South Africa; Susannah discovers a slightly more sinister side of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The riverboat Amaprima cruises through the heart of Europe in this Christmastime tradition; begin with a pre-cruise tour of Prague, then on to Nuremberg, Regensburg, Passau, Austria's Wachau Valley, Vienna, and finishes in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.sub-title: A Show Home for a Show Girl
programme.desc: Real estate developer David and his wife, Penelope, seek to upgrade their living accommodations; David would like to purchase a high-end luxury property, while Penelope prefers to play it safe by acquiring a more moderately priced home.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: More than 50 million people travel to Los Angeles each year, thanks to its year-round summer-like weather and plethora of fun things to do; this episode tours the city in a fun three-wheeled car, taste testing its best kept secrets.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: An island where the finest luxuries co-exist in absolute harmony with nature.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Popular beaches, reefs and full moon celebrations in the British Virgin Islands.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.sub-title: Channel Islands, California by Sea Kayak and SUP
programme.desc: Explore Southern California's beautiful Channel Islands and the surrounding area by sea kayak and SUP.
